children.heading: Use by plan actuary in determining unfunded vested benefits of a plan for computing withdrawal liability of employer
children.label: a Use by plan actuary in determining unfunded vested benefits of a plan for computing withdrawal liability of employer

children.text: actuarial assumptions and methods which, in the aggregate, are reasonable (taking into account the experience of the plan and reasonable expectations) and which, in combination, offer the actuary’s best estimate of anticipated experience under the plan, or
actuarial assumptions and methods set forth in the corporation’s regulations for purposes of determining an employer’s withdrawal liability.

children.heading: Factors determinative of unfunded vested benefits of plan for computing withdrawal liability of employer
children.label: b Factors determinative of unfunded vested benefits of plan for computing withdrawal liability of employer

children.text: rely on the most recent complete actuarial valuation used for purposes of and reasonable estimates for the interim years of the unfunded vested benefits, andsection 412 of title 26
in the absence of complete data, rely on the data available or on data secured by a sampling which can reasonably be expected to be representative of the status of the entire plan.

children.heading: Determination of amount of unfunded vested benefits
children.label: c Determination of amount of unfunded vested benefits
A
children.text: the value of nonforfeitable benefits under the plan, less

children.label: B
children.text: the value of the assets of the plan.
